application.notes: Entry is via the online registration form; the student is assigned to the appropriate age and experience group from the form. Discounts do not stack.

location.venue: Casa de Balet, Bucharest (Final Showcase Gala at the National Opera Bucharest)

prices.label: Full workshop and Final Showcase Gala

schedule.notes: Accommodation assistance is offered close to the venue with breakfast included (not part of the participation fee); airport transfers provided.
